comments:
Complete game timing — chess clocks, turn timers, time controls.
Time bounded 0-86400000ms (24 hours). Deterministic at billion-agent scale.

declarations.comments: Time in milliseconds, bounded 0-86400000 (24 hours). Clamped at bounds.
declarations.title: Milliseconds

declarations.comments: Time control types for competitive games.
declarations.title: TimeControl

declarations.comments: FIDE/Lichess standard presets: Bullet (<3m), Blitz (3-10m), Rapid (10-30m), Classical (30+m)
declarations.title: StandardTimeControl

name: Hydrogen.Schema.Game.Timer
